title: The Ultimate Sacrifice: Karna’s Golden Armor #mahabharata #mythology #comic #shorts
description: Born with divine armor fused to his skin, Karna was invincible. But a single act of charity would change the course of the Great War. #IndianMythology #Karna #Lore #GraphicNovel #History

scenes.narration: He was born to be the greatest warrior, protected by a divine armor that was literally part of his skin.
scenes.image_prompt: A powerful Indian warrior with golden armor and earrings fused into his skin, glowing with celestial light, dark fantasy graphic novel style, heavy ink shadows, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Karna, the son of the Sun God, was invincible as long as he wore his Kavach and Kundal.
scenes.image_prompt: Karna standing tall on a battlefield, arrows bouncing off his golden chest plate, traditional Indian comic book art, rich warm colors, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But Karna had one weakness: he could never refuse a beggar during his morning prayers.
scenes.image_prompt: Karna standing in a river, offering water to the sun, a humble silhouette in the background, stylized comic panel, dramatic morning light, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Knowing this, Lord Indra descended from the heavens disguised as an old, frail priest.
scenes.image_prompt: A thin, elderly Brahmin priest with a walking stick, shadows hiding his divine eyes, traditional Indian graphic novel style, heavy textures, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The priest asked for the impossible: he wanted the very armor Karna was born with.
scenes.image_prompt: Close up of the old priest's face, a subtle, cunning smile in the shadows, dynamic comic book lighting, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Karna knew it was a trap. He knew that without his armor, he would surely die in battle.
scenes.image_prompt: Close up of Karna’s face, eyes filled with realization and sorrow, heavy ink lines, classical Indian features, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But his word was his life. With a steady hand, he took a knife and began to cut the armor from his own body.
scenes.image_prompt: Visceral comic art, Karna using a dagger to peel the golden armor from his chest, blood mixed with golden light, dramatic and tragic aesthetic, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Blood soaked the ground as he handed over his invincibility to the disguised god.
scenes.image_prompt: Karna kneeling, holding out the bloodied golden armor, the priest's shadow looming over him, dark comic book panel, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: He lost his protection, but he gained immortality as the greatest giver in history. The Tragic Hero, Karna.
scenes.image_prompt: Karna standing weak but proud against a setting sun, a scarred chest where the armor once was, epic and emotional final comic panel, fade to black, vertical 1080x1920
